svg.text: Running best accepted mean CER50k by evaluation suite; lower is better. Source-retokenized rows are diagnostic and excluded.

circle.title: 0 core-100k keep mean=0.551740: baseline 100k core suite
1 core-100k discard mean=0.550788: 4096 anchors low-data test
4 core-100k discard mean=0.552256: torch_topk_128
5 core-100k discard mean=0.552060: adaptive anchors for oversized cipher vocab
6 core-1m keep mean=0.345124: baseline 1m core suite
7 core-1m keep mean=0.344772: candidate_window_25000
8 core-100k discard mean=0.553000: candidate_window_25000
9 core-100k keep mean=0.551616: scale-aware candidate window
10 core-1m keep mean=0.341820: scale-aware candidate window
11 core-1m discard mean=0.341848: large_sample_window_20000
12 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.190540: scale-aware candidate window validation
13 core-1m keep mean=0.340460: eight_refinement_rounds
14 core-100k discard mean=0.551052: eight_refinement_rounds
15 core-100k keep mean=0.551484: final scale-aware window and rounds
16 core-1m keep mean=0.340636: final scale-aware window and rounds
17 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.188973: final scale-aware window and rounds
19 core-1m discard mean=0.341584: include current mapping edge
22 core-1m keep mean=0.324816: skip distance-2 context features for large samples
23 core-100k keep mean=0.551288: skip context refactor guard at small scale
24 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.167713: skip distance-2 context features for large samples
25 core-1m keep mean=0.310860: full weight distance-2 context
26 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.160420: full weight distance-2 context
27 core-100k keep mean=0.551568: full skip weight small-scale guard; skip inactive
29 core-1m keep mean=0.290864: learn skip-context weight from anchor pairs
30 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.106620: learn skip-context weight from anchor pairs
31 core-100k keep mean=0.551400: learned skip weight small-scale guard; skip inactive
40 core-100k keep mean=0.511912: enable learned skip context at 100k
41 core-1m keep mean=0.292092: enable learned skip context at 100k; 1m guard
42 core-100k discard mean=0.513796: eight rounds at 100k worsened learned skip-context
43 core-100k discard mean=0.512716: wide candidate window at 100k improved max but worsened mean
44 core-100k keep mean=0.498820: dynamic anchor refresh improves low-data alignment
45 core-1m discard mean=0.299716: dynamic anchor refresh regressed 1m guard
46 core-100k keep mean=0.498820: gate dynamic anchor refresh to 100k
48 core-100k discard mean=0.500644: wide candidate window worsened dynamic-anchor 100k suite
49 core-100k discard mean=0.499752: assignment-margin anchor refresh worsened low-data suite
50 core-100k discard mean=0.501332: freezing dynamic anchors after early rounds worsened low-data suite
53 core-100k discard mean=0.498456: learned dynamic block weights marginally improved mean but added disproportionate complexity
54 core-100k discard mean=0.500752: static left-context downweighting regressed low-data suite
56 core-100k discard mean=0.495868: assignment swap repair improved mean but regressed max hard pair
57 core-100k keep mean=0.495560: thresholded assignment swap repair improves low-data mean and max without hard-pair regression
58 core-100k discard mean=0.496196: stricter swap margin helped easy pairs but regressed hard-pair max and suite mean
59 core-100k discard mean=0.494888: midpoint swap margin improved mean but overfit easy pairs and regressed hard-pair max
62 core-100k discard mean=0.498080: byte-LM local reranker improved max and fluency but overrepaired Mistral/MiMo and worsened mean
64 core-100k keep mean=0.484740: direct token-bigram objective refinement improves low-data mean and max across tokenizer pairs
66 core-100k keep mean=0.479844: 50k direct-bigram swap proposals further improve low-data mean and max
67 core-100k keep mean=0.474732: 100k direct-bigram swap proposals improve all low-data tokenizer pairs
68 core-100k keep mean=0.465648: two direct-bigram refinement passes improve every low-data tokenizer pair
69 core-100k keep mean=0.463248: third direct-bigram refinement pass improves aggregate and hard-pair max despite one easy-pair regression
70 core-100k keep mean=0.460496: four direct-bigram refinement passes improve every low-data tokenizer pair over the third pass
81 core-1m keep mean=0.282488: all-scale direct bigram refinement improves 1m mean and max while preserving 100k path
82 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.103953: all-scale direct bigram refinement improves 10m mean with small Qwen max regression
83 core-10m-3pair discard mean=0.103960: two bigram passes at 10m slightly improved max but worsened mean and BPB
84 core-1m keep mean=0.275664: 4096-token high-data bigram refinement improves every 1m core pair
85 core-10m-3pair discard mean=0.106133: 4096-token high-data block regressed 10m mean despite slight Qwen max improvement
86 core-10m-3pair keep mean=0.103947: gating 4096-token block to 1m restores 10m mean and keeps improved max
88 core-1m keep mean=0.271432: 8192-token 1m block improves mean but slightly regresses Mistral max and runtime
89 core-1m discard mean=0.272864: 6144-token 1m block improved runtime and max but lost too much mean CER versus 8192
93 core-1m keep mean=0.270288: three 1m bigram passes improve mean max and runtime versus four passes
96 core-1m keep mean=0.269164: mixing distance-2 bigrams into 1m refinement improves mean max and BPB
98 core-1m discard mean=0.270004: quarter-weight skip bigrams improved BPB but lost mean CER versus half weight
100 core-1m keep mean=0.267432: 0.4 skip-bigram weight improves 1m mean and max versus accepted half-weight setting
102 core-100k discard mean=0.472880: fixed-context bigram swap objective worsened low-data suite despite broader neighbor evidence
103 core-100k discard mean=0.472496: repair-closure node selection overfit proposed swaps and worsened low-data suite
112 core-100k keep mean=0.457956: gated unigram-backoff smoothing tau 1000 improves low-data mean and max
114 core-100k keep mean=0.453876: fixed-neighbor tail unary repair improves low-data mean and max after gated unigram backoff
122 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.458608: recomputed core-100k with Gemma replacing redundant MiMo
123 core-1m-gemma keep mean=0.277212: recomputed core-1m with Gemma replacing redundant MiMo
125 core-1m-gemma diagnostic mean=0.233060: source-retokenized high-data path improves every Gemma-core 1m pair but is out-of-scope for non-same-tokenizer evaluation
128 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.457680: external-owner missed-candidate repair improves Gemma-core 100k mean and max despite Mistral regression
130 core-100k-gemma discard mean=0.457860: jackknife-gated external-owner repair reduced Mistral overfit but lost suite mean and max versus raw owner repair
133 core-100k-gemma discard mean=0.457544: wordish external-owner gate slightly improved mean but regressed Gemma max versus raw owner repair
139 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.457632: stricter tail repair threshold marginally improves Gemma-core 100k CER mean and max despite Qwen and DeepSeek regressions
141 core-100k-gemma discard mean=0.457656: tail repair threshold 0.35 improves suite max but loses mean CER and BPB versus accepted 0.30
143 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456796: larger 1280-token tail repair block improves Gemma-core 100k mean max and BPB despite Mistral regression
144 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456392: larger 1536-token tail repair block improves Gemma-core 100k mean max and BPB while worsening Mistral
145 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456372: 2048-token tail repair block slightly improves 100k suite mean and sharply improves max and BPB
150 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456364: free local-pair variable emission gives a tiny non-same-tokenizer 100k mean CER and BPB gain
151 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456364: two free local-pair variable emissions preserve CER gain and improve BPB versus single emission
163 core-100k-gemma keep mean=0.456320: LCB-gated extra bigram pass accepts a tiny stable subset of overfit fifth-pass swaps and slightly improves 100k Gemma-core mean and BPB
